patterns_discovered.description: Search both flat state dirs (.cards/STATE/*.jobcard) and team-prefixed dirs (.cards/team-*/STATE/*.jobcard)
patterns_discovered.benefit: covers all card organizational structures in the project

patterns_discovered.description: Match card by spec slug, spec_id substring in card ID, or spec_id in card title
patterns_discovered.benefit: flexible matching reduces false negatives when spec-card naming doesn't perfectly align

patterns_discovered.description: Non-fatal error handling with try/catch blocks and early returns
patterns_discovered.benefit: spec run continues even if card linkage fails; prints colored diagnostic messages

patterns_discovered.description: Update metadata via open → upsert → to json → save --force pipeline
patterns_discovered.benefit: idempotent metadata updates; creates field if absent, updates if present

patterns_discovered.description: Use ansi color codes (green=success, yellow=warning, light_gray=info) for diagnostics
patterns_discovered.benefit: clear visual feedback on card linkage outcome in dispatcher output

gotchas_discovered.description: Matching via str contains on card_id/title could match unintended cards if spec_id is generic (e.g. '027')
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: prioritize exact slug match first; only use contains as fallback

gotchas_discovered.description: Nested loops through all state dirs and team dirs + all cards in each + nested meta.json reads could be slow with large card counts
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: early break on first match; consider caching matched spec_id→card_id in future

gotchas_discovered.description: Each state_dir and meta_path must be checked for existence before open/ls to avoid exceptions
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: code includes explicit path exists checks and try/catch blocks

gotchas_discovered.description: Assumes spec directory follows format 'NNN-slug'; regex and str replace rely on this convention
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: code extracts slug by dropping spec_id prefix; breaks if naming changes

approach_details.task: Link card metadata to auto-claude spec by finding matching card in .cards/ state dirs and writing ac_spec_id to meta.json
implementation_strategy: search all 5 state dirs (pending/running/done/failed/merged) in both flat and team-prefixed paths
match card by id==slug, id contains spec_id, or title contains spec_id
on match: open meta.json, upsert ac_spec_id field, save with --force
make linkage non-fatal: warn but continue if no match

recommendations.recommendation: Add explicit card_id parameter to link_card_to_spec to allow caller to override search
recommendations.rationale: improves debugging and avoids ambiguity if multiple cards could match

recommendations.recommendation: Consider memoizing recent spec_id→card_path mappings in a transient .bop/spec_links.json
recommendations.rationale: avoids repeated directory scans if multiple specs run in same dispatch session

recommendations.recommendation: Add dry-run output (e.g. --verbose flag) to print which card was matched before ac_spec_id write
recommendations.rationale: aids debugging when automated matching produces unexpected linkages

recommendations.recommendation: Log ac_spec_id linkage event to card's events.jsonl for audit trail
recommendations.rationale: consistent with storage model decision (fs state + JSONL append-only log)
